title: Personal events are excluded from public listings
statement: Public event-listing endpoints must filter Event.category != 'personal'; personal events must always carry slug = None (never '') to dodge SQLite UNIQUE-collision; personal events are visible only to their owner_id via the dedicated /events/personal endpoint.

claims_code.where: events.py — main public listing filters category != 'personal'
events.py — my-schedule includes personal events of the caller but excludes other users' personal events
events.py — viewer-scoped to current_user.id; the ONLY surface that returns personal events to non-owners (and it doesn't — they're owner-scoped)
events.py — single-event read denies if category=='personal' and caller is not owner

source: commit 4fd165d (slug-UNIQUE fix); commits 7570175 → revert 57f2e00 → re-fix b887b73 (category-filter regression history)
